crime.value: Hotel room homicide with slashed throat and beating
crime.quote: three inch slash on her throat. The hotel room was in disarray. Tables knocked over, clothes and papers scattered

victim.value: Woman seeking fame, involved in affair at hotel
victim.quote: cheating wife in a hotel room with a man he doesn't even know

closed_world.value: Hotel room crime scene and mental institution
closed_world.quote: The hotel was one of the best in town

culprit_and_motive.value: Husband who murdered attorney and is institutionalized, motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: paper from 20 years ago stated that he had murdered that big shot attorney. Plead insane and won

investigator.value: Investigators collecting evidence, but narrative perspective unclear
investigator.quote: The investigators picked up all the evidence, put the body in a body bag

red_herring.value: The mysterious man in the suit appears to be supernatural misdirection from the actual psychological breakdown
red_herring.quote: Time froze yet again, and there was the man in the suit. The man sat on the desk looking a little amused.

social_world.value: Small town religious conservatism creating violent persecution of LGBTQ+ individuals
social_world.quote: the town wasn't very pleased, they found out faster then she could ever imagine them finding out

reveal_mechanic.value: Mental institution records reveal the protagonist murdered an attorney 20 years ago and has been institutionalized
reveal_mechanic.quote: A paper from 20 years ago stated that he had murdered that big shot attorney. Plead insane and won.

media_and_audience.value: Hotel murder becomes sensationalized news story, exploiting victim's desire for fame
media_and_audience.quote: It was all over the news and of course they had all their own theories.

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's guilt over neglecting his marriage and driving his wife to infidelity
investigator_wound.quote: He was never home, work always kept him late. She deserved someone better.
